diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+from transformers import AutoModel

+

+class SpoofDetector(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, encoder_name='facebook/wav2vec2-xls-r-300m', freeze_feature_extractor=True):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.encoder = AutoModel.from_pretrained(encoder_name)

+        if freeze_feature_extractor:

+            self.encoder.feature_extractor._freeze_parameters()

+        hidden = self.encoder.config.hidden_size

+        # Learnable layer weights for weighted sum of all transformer layers

+        num_layers = self.encoder.config.num_hidden_layers + 1

+        self.layer_weights = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(num_layers))

+        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden, 256),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(256, 1),

+        )

+

+    def forward(self, input_values, attention_mask=None):

+        out = self.encoder(input_values, attention_mask=attention_mask, output_hidden_states=True)

+        hs = torch.stack(out.hidden_states, dim=0)  # (L, B, T, H)

+        w = torch.softmax(self.layer_weights, dim=0).view(-1, 1, 1, 1)

+        x = (hs * w).sum(dim=0)  # (B, T, H)

+        if attention_mask is not None:

+            # build feature-level mask

+            try:

+                feat_lens = self.encoder._get_feat_extract_output_lengths(attention_mask.sum(-1)).to(torch.long)

+            except Exception:

+                feat_lens = torch.full((x.size(0),), x.size(1), device=x.device, dtype=torch.long)

+            mask = torch.arange(x.size(1), device=x.device)[None, :] < feat_lens[:, None]

+            mask = mask.unsqueeze(-1).float()

+            x = (x * mask).sum(1) / mask.sum(1).clamp(min=1)

+        else:

+            x = x.mean(dim=1)

+        return self.classifier(x).squeeze(-1)
